positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene. Central composition features a friendly, stylized fox peeking from behind giant, bioluminescent mushrooms. The atmosphere is magical and cozy, with soft golden hour lighting filtering through the canopy. The style is modern folk art meets kawaii, using thick, clean outlines and a limited, cheerful color palette (teal, burnt orange, sage green, cream). The forest elements should be simplified and graphic, designed to look excellent on clothing—like a seamless pattern segment or a standalone graphic. Focus on high contrast between the shadowy background and the illuminated subject matter. Highly detailed, vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photographic, realism
